FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know about our trading courses and membership.

No prior experience is required. We have courses designed for complete beginners as well as advanced traders. Our beginner courses start from the absolute basics and progressively build your skills.

Yes, all mentor track records and student testimonials are verified through third-party trading account verification. We only feature traders with documented, audited trading histories.

You can start with as little as $100 for paper trading (simulated). For live trading, we recommend starting with $500-$1,000 and using proper risk management. Many of our courses teach strategies suitable for smaller accounts.

No, we do not guarantee any profits or returns. Trading involves substantial risk, and past performance is not indicative of future results. Our courses teach strategies and risk management, but your results depend on many factors including market conditions and your execution.

We cover cryptocurrency, stocks, forex, options, futures, and prediction markets like Polymarket. Each market has dedicated courses taught by specialists with proven track records in that specific market.

Yes, Pro and Elite members get access to live trading sessions where mentors share their screens and explain their decision-making process in real-time. Basic members can access recorded sessions.

We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all membership plans. If you're not satisfied with the courses or community, contact support within 30 days for a full refund, no questions asked.

Yes, all courses are fully responsive and work on mobile devices. We also have a mobile app (iOS and Android) for watching courses, joining live sessions, and chatting with the community.

Still have questions? We're here to help.

Contact Support
